en: The elder to the elect lady and her children, whom I love in truth, and not only I, but also all who know the truth,
zh: 我這作長老的，寫信給蒙揀選的夫人和她的兒女。你們是我在真理中所愛的；不單是我，凡認識真理的，

en: because of the truth that abides in us and will be with us forever:
zh: 也因為真理的緣故愛你們。這真理在我們裡面，也必與我們同在，直到永遠。

en: Grace, mercy, and peace will be with us, from God the Father and from Jesus Christ the Father's Son, in truth and love.
zh: 願恩惠、憐憫、平安，從父 神和他兒子耶穌基督在真理和愛中與我們同在。

en: I rejoiced greatly to find some of your children walking in the truth, just as we were commanded by the Father.
zh: 我看見你的兒女中，有人照著我們從父領受的命令在真理中行事，我就非常欣慰。

en: And now I ask you, dear lady- not as though I were writing you a new commandment, but the one we have had from the beginning- that we love one another.
zh: 夫人哪，我現在請求你，我們要彼此相愛。我寫給你的，不是一條新命令，而是我們從起初就有的。

en: And this is love, that we walk according to his commandments; this is the commandment, just as you have heard from the beginning, so that you should walk in it.
zh: 我們要照著他的命令行事，這就是愛。你們從起初所聽見的那命令，就是要你們憑著愛心行事。

en: For many deceivers have gone out into the world, those who do not confess the coming of Jesus Christ in the flesh. Such a one is the deceiver and the antichrist.
zh: 有許多欺騙人的已經在世上出現，他們否認耶穌基督是成了肉身來的；這就是那騙人的和敵基督的。

en: Watch yourselves, so that you may not lose what we have worked for, but may win a full reward.
zh: 你們要小心，不要拆毀我們已經完成的工作，卻要得著美滿的賞賜。

en: Everyone who goes on ahead and does not abide in the teaching of Christ, does not have God. Whoever abides in the teaching has both the Father and the Son.
zh: 凡越過基督的教訓又不持守的，就沒有 神；持守這教訓的，就有父和子了。

en: If anyone comes to you and does not bring this teaching, do not receive him into your house or give him any greeting,
zh: 如果有人到你們那裡，不傳這教訓，你們就不要接待他到家裡，也不要問候他；

en: for whoever greets him takes part in his wicked works.
zh: 因為問候他的，就在他的惡事上有分了。

en: Though I have much to write to you, I would rather not use paper and ink. Instead I hope to come to you and talk face to face, so that our joy may be complete.
zh: 我還有許多話要寫給你們，可是我不想借用紙墨，只是盼望到你們那裡當面談談，好讓我們的喜樂充足。

en: The children of your elect sister greet you.
zh: 你那蒙揀選的姊妹的兒女都問候你。
